metadata.tagline: Better, deeper sleep is the foundation for healthy living
metadata.purpose: Detailed visual dashboard with FULL scripts and guidance

approaches.script: Looks like you could use an extra shot of espresso today — I've been there. I actually work with a product called REM by Super Patch that helps people get deeper, more restorative sleep without any drugs or melatonin. How would you rate your sleep quality these days?

You know how you're always saying you can never get a good night's sleep? I've been using REM from Super Patch and I'm finally waking up actually feeling rested — no pills, no grogginess. Would you want to try something like that?

Hey! I noticed your late-night post — sounds like sleep hasn't been your friend lately. I've been using REM by Super Patch and it's completely changed how I sleep and how I feel in the morning, all drug-free. Have you ever tried anything natural to improve your sleep?

Hi! [Mutual friend] mentioned you've been struggling with sleep and thought I could help. I work with REM from Super Patch — it's a drug-free patch designed to support deeper, better-quality sleep so you wake up refreshed. Would you be open to hearing how it works?

Be honest — when's the last time you woke up and actually felt fully rested? Most people can't even remember. I work with REM by Super Patch, a drug-free patch that helps people get the deep sleep their body needs. What's your biggest challenge when it comes to getting a good night's rest?

2b_rapport_story.title: 🫂 BUILD RAPPORT
2b_rapport_story.description: Share your personal story to build trust
2b_rapport_story.personal_story: [Name], let me ask you something — do you ever just lie there at 2 AM staring at the ceiling? That was me every single night. Tried melatonin, the teas, the whole routine — nothing stuck. A friend told me about this REM patch and I figured, what do I have to lose? First night, I slept straight through. Woke up actually feeling rested. [Name], I haven't looked back, and I thought of you because I think it could help.
talking_points: Open with their name and a question — everyone relates to bad sleep
Mention what you tried before that failed
Share the specific night everything changed
Talk about how better sleep improved your whole day
Close with why you thought of THEM specifically
2b_rapport_story.transition_to_discovery: So [Name], that's my deal. But I'm curious about you — how are you sleeping these days? Getting the rest you need?

questions.question: When you wake up in the morning, do you actually feel rested — or does it feel like you barely slept?
How would you rate your sleep quality lately on a scale of 1 to 10?
Do you have more trouble falling asleep, staying asleep, or both?
What does your mind tend to do when you're lying in bed trying to fall asleep — does it race or stay calm?
How much does screen time or your evening routine play into your sleep struggles?
How does a bad night's sleep affect your energy, focus, and patience the next day?
If you could wake up feeling genuinely refreshed every morning, what would you do differently with that energy?
What have you tried to improve your sleep — melatonin, sleep apps, medications — and how did those work out?
How do you feel about taking sleep aids that might leave you groggy or dependent over time?
Would a drug-free option that works with your body's natural sleep cycle be something you'd want to explore?

content.problem: You lie in bed exhausted but your mind won't stop racing, you toss and turn for hours, and when the alarm finally goes off you feel like you barely slept at all. Maybe you've tried melatonin, sleep apps, or even prescription sleep aids, but nothing gives you that deep, restorative rest your body is craving. Waking up exhausted has just become your normal.
content.agitate: The worst part is that poor sleep doesn't stay in the bedroom — it follows you everywhere. Your mood tanks, your focus at work falls apart, your patience with the people you love wears thin, and your immune system takes a hit you can't even see. On top of that, the sleep aids you rely on can leave you groggy, build dependency, and never actually fix the underlying problem. {{discovery_callback}}
content.solve: That's exactly what REM was designed for. It uses Vibrotactile Technology — VTT — to support your body's natural sleep cycle so you can fall asleep easier and reach the deep, restorative stages of rest your body needs. No chemicals, no grogginess the next morning, no dependency — just better sleep, naturally.

objections.response: I completely understand. Think about it this way — how much have you spent on sleep aids, melatonin, prescriptions, or even that expensive mattress? REM often costs less per night than a single sleeping pill, and there's no grogginess the next morning. What matters most to you beyond the price when it comes to getting better sleep?
objections.psychology: Shift focus to cumulative cost of sleep aids and prescriptions vs REM's drug-free value

objections.response: Of course, sleep is personal. Is it the idea of a drug-free sleep patch that's new to you, or is there something else on your mind? A lot of people are hesitant because they've been let down by melatonin or sleep meds before. What questions can I answer to help you feel good about this?
objections.psychology: Identify whether hesitation stems from past sleep aid disappointments

objections.response: Great idea — and honestly, does your spouse struggle with sleep too? Poor sleep affects the whole household. A lot of couples end up using REM together. What concerns do you think they'd have so I can help you walk them through the drug-free approach?
objections.psychology: Surface objections early and highlight that sleep issues often affect both partners

objections.response: I totally get the skepticism — there are so many sleep products making big promises. REM is different because it uses Vibrotactile Technology that works with your body's natural sleep rhythms, not by sedating you with chemicals. No grogginess, no dependency. What would you need to experience to believe a drug-free patch could actually improve your sleep?
objections.psychology: Let them define proof while differentiating VTT from chemical sedation

objections.response: I hear that a lot — melatonin that stopped working, sleep meds that left you groggy, apps that didn't do enough. What specifically let you down about those? The reason REM is different is because VTT technology doesn't sedate you — it supports your body's own ability to reach deep, restorative sleep without any drugs or side effects.
objections.psychology: Learn what failed and contrast REM's non-sedative VTT approach against groggy alternatives

objections.response: No pressure at all. Just curious — are you sleeping well enough right now that you're happy with it? A lot of people have just accepted waking up tired as normal. If that ever changes, REM offers deeper sleep without the grogginess or dependency of pills. Worth keeping in mind.
objections.psychology: Uncover whether they've normalized poor sleep and plant a seed for future interest

objections.response: I get it — you've got a lot going on. But here's the thing: REM takes two seconds to apply before bed. No routines, no pills to time, no wind-down rituals. And imagine how much more productive your busy days would be if you were actually waking up fully rested. How would better sleep change your day?
objections.psychology: Reframe time concern into the productivity and energy lost to poor sleep every day

objections.response: Smart to compare — what do you like about that option? Here's what sets REM apart: most sleep aids — pills, gummies, even other patches — use melatonin, antihistamines, or sedatives that can cause grogginess and dependency. REM uses Vibrotactile Technology, meaning zero chemicals enter your body. It supports your natural sleep cycle instead of forcing sedation. How important is waking up clear-headed to you?
objections.psychology: Highlight VTT's grogginess-free, non-sedative advantage over chemical sleep aids

6_closing.title: 🏆 5 CLOSING TECHNIQUES
6_closing.pre_close: Always ask: 'Do you have any questions?' + 'Does this make sense?'

techniques.name: ASSUMPTIVE
techniques.script: Sounds like you're ready to finally wake up refreshed instead of dragging through another morning — let's get REM on the way to you. What's the best shipping address?
techniques.when: They've expressed frustration with tossing and turning or excitement about waking up with real energy

techniques.name: ALTERNATIVE
techniques.script: Would you like the 30-day supply to experience what waking up refreshed actually feels like, or the 90-day pack so you can make great sleep your new normal and save in the process?
techniques.when: They're interested but comparing options — connect each choice to the morning-energy transformation

techniques.name: URGENCY
techniques.script: We've got a promotion ending this week — and honestly, every night you spend tossing and turning is another morning you lose to brain fog and exhaustion. Want to lock this in so tonight can be different?
techniques.when: They've acknowledged poor sleep but are stalling — paint the cost of one more bad night

techniques.name: SUMMARY
techniques.script: So let me recap — you're tired of lying awake at night, you want to stop waking up groggy, and you want real energy in the morning without popping pills. REM delivers all of that, completely drug-free. Ready to start sleeping better?
techniques.when: Long conversation covering multiple sleep struggles — summarize their specific issues and tie REM to the refreshed mornings they want

techniques.name: REFERRAL
techniques.script: Now that you're on your way to real, restful sleep — who else do you know who's up at 2 a.m. scrolling their phone? Your spouse, a friend, a coworker running on caffeine? They'd love to hear about this.
techniques.when: After a successful close — sleep struggles are universal, so their excitement naturally leads to thinking about a spouse or friend who also can't sleep

7_followup.title: 📅 FOLLOW-UP SEQUENCE
7_followup.goal: Build relationship → Get testimonials → Generate referrals

sequence.template: Hey {{FirstName}}! Just confirming your samples are on the way. You should receive them in about 2 days. I'll check back in when they arrive!
Hey {{FirstName}}! Your samples should be arriving today or tomorrow. Have they shown up yet? Let me know when they do — don't open them without me!
Before we open it, I want you to understand. This isn't about hype. It's about experience. I want you to pay attention to what you notice, not what you expect.

Hey {{FirstName}}, checking in! What did you notice today?
What felt different?
When did you feel it most?
What surprised you?
How are you sleeping? Are you waking up more rested? Noticing any changes in how quickly you fall asleep?
Hope you're loving the results! Ready to keep the momentum going? Who else do you know that could use better sleep?
Based on everything you've experienced — are you ready to make this part of your routine? Let's get you set up.
